top_findings.title: npm run build fails with C++ compilation error
top_findings.evidence: better-sqlite3 native module compilation fails: C++20 compiler required. Error from /home/codespace/gt/retort/refinery/rig/experiment-1/runs/language=typescript_model=sonnet_tooling=none/rep3-failed/node_modules/better-sqlite3/build — v8config.h requires C++20
top_findings.suggestion: better-sqlite3 requires a C++20-capable compiler. The environment appears to lack proper C++20 support. Consider using prebuilt binaries or a different SQLite library compatible with the available toolchain.
